instruction: You were recently discharged from the hospital. Complete the following post-discharge tasks: 1) Schedule exactly one PCP follow-up appointment using the next available PCP slot with reason "Post-discharge PCP follow-up", 2) Read the discharge summary message in your inbox, 3) Because the discharge summary in this seed mentions a specialist follow-up, schedule exactly one specialist appointment with reason "Post-discharge specialist follow-up". Do not send any messages and do not modify any prescriptions.
